jokes.text: I don't remember Vuitton having two E's.
jokes.setup: Lindsay examining a fake designer bag in India
jokes.punchline: She notices the misspelling on the knockoff bag
jokes.explanation: Sharp observation that establishes the setting and Lindsay's character - she notices fashion details even when trying to be spiritual

jokes.text: Best bag on the mountain... $120. You just bought the best bag on the mountain.
jokes.setup: Vendor claims to have the best bag
jokes.punchline: Repetitive insistence that every bag is 'the best bag on the mountain'
jokes.explanation: Sets up a running gag about vendors claiming everything is 'the best on the mountain'

jokes.text: Lindsay was on a spiritual journey to let go of all possessions and to find something cute to keep her stuff in.
jokes.setup: Lindsay's supposed spiritual journey about letting go of material things
jokes.punchline: She immediately contradicts this by shopping for bags
jokes.explanation: Perfect character-driven irony - captures Lindsay's shallow approach to spirituality in one line

jokes.text: I'm just not that into older women.
jokes.setup: Lindsay being creepy with her brother after learning she's adopted
jokes.punchline: Michael's rejection implies he might have been interested if she were younger
jokes.explanation: Darkly subversive humor that plays with inappropriate family dynamics

jokes.text: If I'd told them we were taking a bunch of gays out there to get married, they'd have thrown me a parade.
jokes.setup: Lucille trying to defend the boat party incident
jokes.punchline: She suggests gay marriage would be celebrated when her record shows the opposite
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Lucille's obliviousness to her own prejudices

jokes.text: Yeah, I don't think your record on that issue is going to back that up, Mom.
jokes.setup: Lucille's claim about supporting gay marriage
jokes.punchline: Michael immediately calls out her hypocrisy
jokes.explanation: Solid straight-man response that enhances the previous joke

jokes.text: At least I was able to turn my Queen around.
jokes.setup: Discussion about the boat incident
jokes.punchline: Double meaning of 'Queen' - both the boat name and slur
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that works on multiple levels with the boat name

jokes.text: None taken. This is Tobias Fünke, who should have taken more.
jokes.setup: Tobias says 'none taken' to what could be a gay slur
jokes.punchline: Narrator points out Tobias should be more offended
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment highlighting Tobias's cluelessness about his own behavior

jokes.text: Kenny, Chet, Curtis, Mike, Bix, and Gator are over here.
jokes.setup: Separating Bluth family from victims
jokes.punchline: Ridiculous names for the boat party victims
jokes.explanation: Absurd list of victim names that sounds like fraternity brothers

jokes.text: Sorry. I was thinking of Mike, the hot seaman.
jokes.setup: Trying to remember Michael's name
jokes.punchline: Double entendre with 'seaman' (sailor/semen)
jokes.explanation: Basic sexual wordplay that fits George Sr.'s crude character

jokes.text: Is that a gall see? No, it's just a fallacy
jokes.setup: Lindsay mispronounces 'fallacy' as 'phallic-y'
jokes.punchline: Tobias corrects her pronunciation, missing the Freudian slip
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that reveals both characters' traits - Lindsay's malapropisms and Tobias's obliviousness

jokes.text: Yeah, we should end it. / Let's give it another shot. To the head. Kill it. Yes.
jokes.setup: They seem to agree on ending their marriage
jokes.punchline: Tobias thinks they're agreeing to try again, adds violent metaphors
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection that shows their complete miscommunication and Tobias's dark metaphors

jokes.text: Stay in your lane, anus tart!
jokes.setup: Lindsay trying to embrace spiritual oneness
jokes.punchline: Immediately road rages using Tobias's business cards insult
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback that shows Lindsay's hypocrisy - talks about oneness while using a famous insult

jokes.text: a self-cleaning litter box in case she ever got a cat, and an inflatable hat box in case she ever got a hat
jokes.setup: Lindsay proud of only buying two things from SkyMall
jokes.punchline: Both purchases are completely unnecessary and hypothetical
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Lindsay's logic - buying things she doesn't need for pets/items she doesn't have

jokes.text: No. It wasn't a cow. It was just a tourist.
jokes.setup: Lindsay concerned they hit something with the bus
jokes.punchline: Driver casually dismisses hitting a person vs. a sacred cow
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy about cultural values - cows are sacred, tourists are disposable

jokes.text: Oh, no, anything under a small is considered a David Spade.
jokes.setup: Lindsay shopping for clothes that say 'Kate'
jokes.punchline: Store uses celebrity names as size categories
jokes.explanation: Creative absurdist humor using David Spade's thin frame as a size reference

jokes.text: There's a pool? It's hard to tell because there are so many people in it, but yes, it is a pool.
jokes.setup: Lindsay asking about pool for her light ego cleanse
jokes.punchline: Pool is so overcrowded it's unrecognizable
jokes.explanation: Good observational humor about overcrowded tourist destinations

jokes.text: You are so full of (BLEEP). Yeah, yeah. Although, in my culture, 'full of (BLEEP)' is kind of like a dig.
jokes.setup: Shaman tells Lindsay she's full of shit
jokes.punchline: Lindsay politely explains this is considered rude in her culture
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Lindsay's politeness even when being insulted

jokes.text: This bag is as fake as you are. Well, how do I learn? Just look at the spelling.
jokes.setup: Shaman says Lindsay is fake like her bag
jokes.punchline: Lindsay thinks he's giving bag authentication tips, not life advice
jokes.explanation: Perfect misdirection showing Lindsay's materialism overriding spiritual insight

jokes.text: She had. It was just too crowded to see the water.
jokes.setup: Lindsay thinking she hasn't been to the beach yet
jokes.punchline: She had been, but couldn't see the water through crowds
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag that pays off the overcrowding theme

jokes.text: I just talked to the shaman, just right back at... Coincidence?
jokes.setup: Lindsay's credit card declined after seeing fake shaman
jokes.punchline: Narrator sarcastically asks if it's a coincidence
jokes.explanation: Good meta moment acknowledging the obvious irony

jokes.text: Would you take a grimace?
jokes.setup: Lucille wants Lindsay smiling at the trial
jokes.punchline: Lindsay negotiates down from a smile to a grimace
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Lindsay's reluctance and negotiation instincts

jokes.text: Stop with the prayer hands. It just looks like you're out of ideas. Seriously, shoot me if you ever catch me doing that.
jokes.setup: Lindsay doing spiritual prayer hands gesture
jokes.punchline: Michael mocks the gesture as looking indecisive
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag mocking new-age spiritual gestures as corporate clichés

jokes.text: No, Michael. I'm not a whore. I don't get any of the money until after I do the disgusting thing.
jokes.setup: Lindsay defending herself against being called a whore
jokes.punchline: Her defense is that she doesn't get paid until after the act
jokes.explanation: Brilliant logic that accidentally proves she IS a prostitute by describing payment structure

jokes.text: I got the part.
jokes.setup: Lindsay declaring her love for Tobias
jokes.punchline: Tobias enters excited about getting an acting role, missing the moment
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Tobias's self-absorption and bad timing

jokes.text: NINJA, please!
jokes.setup: Real estate agent explaining NINJA loan (No Income, No Job, No Assets)
jokes.punchline: Lindsay uses it as an expression like 'please'
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay mixing financial terminology with street slang

jokes.text: That way, we have it... That way, you'll have it... That way, you have it.
jokes.setup: Discussing features they don't need
jokes.punchline: Circular logic about 'having it' becomes a verbal loop
jokes.explanation: Escalating absurdity of housing bubble mentality through repetitive phrase

jokes.text: Now, that's John Beard, he's on television. No one's gonna look down on you just 'cause you have less than John Beard.
jokes.setup: Realtor mentioning John Beard's double gatehouse
jokes.punchline: Uses local news anchor as status symbol reference
jokes.explanation: Good callback using local news anchor as aspirational figure

jokes.text: God, they grow up so slowly.
jokes.setup: Lindsay talking about Maeby going to school
jokes.punchline: Reverses normal parental complaint about kids growing up fast
jokes.explanation: Perfect subversion of parental cliché showing Lindsay's impatience

jokes.text: 'Suckled at her champagne glass breasts' isn't a joke?
jokes.setup: Lindsay reading testimony Buster wrote
jokes.punchline: She questions if obviously sexual language is meant to be funny
jokes.explanation: Cringe humor from Buster's inappropriate testimony about his mother

jokes.text: And I want to smell the suds.
jokes.setup: Reading Buster's testimony about bubble baths
jokes.punchline: Even more inappropriate sensory details
jokes.explanation: Escalates the inappropriate nature of Buster's testimony

jokes.text: good luck getting that (BLEEP) raccoon smell out of the gatehouse, because I never could.
jokes.setup: John Beard leaving his house keys on news desk
jokes.punchline: Reveals absurd problem with his fancy gatehouse
jokes.explanation: Good payoff showing even luxury properties have ridiculous problems

jokes.text: Well, I'm sorry, but I'm such a star (BLEEP) that I didn't pay attention to anything he said!
jokes.setup: Tobias defending wasting money on acting class
jokes.punchline: He admits to being a starstruck fan rather than learning
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Tobias's self-awareness about his starstruck behavior

jokes.text: And that was with me picturing fudge.
jokes.setup: Lindsay's unconvincing declaration of love
jokes.punchline: Tobias reveals his mental trick to seem moved
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing how disconnected their relationship is

jokes.text: Well, that's an easy one. You're A Good Man, Charlie Brown. / No, Mame.
jokes.setup: Asked about how he got 'hooked' (on drugs)
jokes.punchline: Tobias thinks it's about theater roles, worker thinks musicals
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection showing the communication breakdown at drug clinic

jokes.text: 'Garden Grove Methodone Clinic.'
jokes.setup: Tobias thinks he's at a Method acting clinic
jokes.punchline: Visual reveal it's actually a methadone clinic
jokes.explanation: Brilliant visual punchline that recontextualizes the entire scene

jokes.text: He joined al-Qaeda. / And I only signed up 'cause he was giving away a free beard brush.
jokes.setup: Marky explaining accidentally joining wrong political group
jokes.punchline: He joined terrorist organization for grooming supplies
jokes.explanation: Dark absurdist humor about accidental terrorism recruitment through free gifts

jokes.text: A bunch of deranged bees chased him out of a tree and he fell to his death.
jokes.setup: Asked about his father's death after joking about falling from tree
jokes.punchline: Reveals he actually did die falling from tree, but in absurd way
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy escalation that makes the fake-out even more morbid

jokes.text: That's why I swiped that methadone tray.
jokes.setup: Restaurant doesn't deal with money
jokes.punchline: Lindsay reveals she stole drugs to pay for dinner
jokes.explanation: Good callback showing Lindsay's casual criminal behavior for dinner

jokes.text: Oh, no. He just took some methadone. He thought he was driving with a cocktail tray.
jokes.setup: Explaining Tobias's drug-addled behavior
jokes.punchline: He was unintentionally high while driving
jokes.explanation: Shows Tobias's obliviousness extending to accidental drug use

jokes.text: Those were wetlands? That explains our Thanksgiving miracle.
jokes.setup: Learning their house destroyed wetlands
jokes.punchline: Reveals the source of their Thanksgiving duck
jokes.explanation: Good setup for visual gag showing environmental destruction as dinner source

jokes.text: It's a miracle!
jokes.setup: Chasing duck into oven for Thanksgiving
jokes.punchline: They consider cooking wildlife from their yard a miracle
jokes.explanation: Visual gag showing their low standards for holiday meals

jokes.text: Coincidence? / That's not a coincidence. / Yes, it is
jokes.setup: Lindsay noting ostrich coincidence with shaman
jokes.punchline: Narrator corrects their mystical interpretation
jokes.explanation: Running gag about characters misinterpreting coincidences

jokes.text: Live truthfully. Skate through life.
jokes.setup: Marky's profound life motto
jokes.punchline: Visual reveals it's actually a skateboard company slogan
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag revealing the commercial source of his 'wisdom'

jokes.text: So this guy all the way to that guy back there, that's just a piece of wood I stick in there.
jokes.setup: Marky explaining his dental situation
jokes.punchline: Reveals most of his teeth are fake wood
jokes.explanation: Visual gag about his DIY dental work that's both gross and absurd

jokes.text: No. I have no idea what you look like. I have this condition called face blindness.
jokes.setup: Lindsay asking if he finds her pretty
jokes.punchline: He literally can't see faces, explaining his attraction
jokes.explanation: Perfect character reveal that explains the romantic connection ironically

jokes.text: Also wanted to make sure you weren't a dude. I can tell with voices usually, but some guys, they'll fool you if that's what they want to do.
jokes.setup: Marky's face blindness condition
jokes.punchline: He had to verify Lindsay's gender through other means
jokes.explanation: Extends the face blindness gag with uncomfortable implications

jokes.text: I thought you were taking a dump. I must have scared the (BLEEP) off that lady in the bathroom when I threw the door open and told her I loved her.
jokes.setup: Marky responding to Lindsay's phone call
jokes.punchline: He accidentally declared love to stranger in bathroom
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy escalating from his face blindness condition

jokes.text: I have the worst (BLEEP) shaman.
jokes.setup: Lindsay realizes she's with a face-blind man with wooden teeth on an ostrich farm
jokes.punchline: She blames the shaman for her situation
jokes.explanation: Perfect culmination of Lindsay's spiritual journey gone wrong - iconic line

jokes.text: Great. Even cuter.
jokes.setup: Lindsay cuts her hair to be less glamorous
jokes.punchline: The haircut makes her look better, frustrating her goals
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag about Lindsay's inability to look bad

jokes.text: Could I get some more of that acting juice?
jokes.setup: Tobias struggling with acting exercise
jokes.punchline: He requests more methadone thinking it's acting enhancement
jokes.explanation: Good callback showing Tobias's continued confusion about the clinic
